site.title: Uncle Money - Learn Why Earning Money Matters!
site.description: A fun children's book for ages 8-10 that teaches kids why earning money matters. Join the adventure with Uncle Money!
site.author: Nibir Sarker

hero.tagline: Discover Why Earning Money is the Best Adventure!
hero.subtitle: A fun-filled story that teaches kids the value of hard work and saving

about.title: Why Uncle Money?
about.content: In this exciting adventure, kids join our friendly Uncle Money as he shows them the magic of earning, saving, and spending wisely. Perfect for ages 8-10, this book makes financial literacy fun!
lessons: The joy of saving for goals

author.name: Nibir Sarker
author.bio: Nibir Sarker loves writing stories that help kids learn important life lessons while having fun. With a background in education and a passion for making complex topics simple, Uncle Money was born from the desire to teach children about money in an engaging way.

samplePages.text: Once upon a time, in a cozy little town, there lived a wise uncle everyone called Uncle Money...
'The best things in life aren't free,' Uncle Money smiled. 'They're earned with hard work and creativity!'
The children learned that saving up for something special made it even more meaningful when they finally got it!
